title: Add keyboard shortcuts
body: Add keyboard shortcuts for common actions like save, search, create new item, and navigate between sections to improve power user productivity.
label: feature

title: Implement advanced search with filters
body: Enhance the search functionality to support filtering by date range, category, author, status, and tags with the ability to save frequent searches.
label: feature

title: Dark mode toggle does not persist after refresh
body: When I enable dark mode and refresh the page, the setting resets to light mode. The preference is not being saved to localStorage correctly.
label: bug

title: Implement role based access control
body: Add granular role based permissions so organization admins can define custom roles with specific read, write, and delete permissions per resource type.
label: feature

title: CSV import fails with BOM character
body: CSV files exported from Excel contain a BOM character at the start which causes the import parser to fail on the first row.
label: bug

title: Add collaborative commenting system
body: Allow users to add threaded comments on records with mentions using at symbol, reactions using emoji, and the ability to resolve comment threads.
label: feature

title: Add AI powered writing assistant
body: Integrate an AI assistant that can help users write better descriptions, suggest improvements to task titles, and auto generate summaries of long content.
label: feature

title: Password reset email not sending
body: Users clicking forgot password do not receive the reset email. The email service integration is returning a 200 but emails are not delivered.
label: bug

title: Add dark mode support
body: It would be great to have a dark mode option for users who prefer it or work in low light environments. This should include a toggle in settings and respect the system preference.
label: feature

title: Improve mobile documentation formatting
body: The documentation website is not mobile friendly. Text is too small, code blocks overflow the screen, and navigation menus are difficult to use on smartphones.
label: documentation

title: Filter not applied correctly after sorting
body: When a user sorts a table and then applies a filter, the filter is applied to the unfiltered dataset instead of maintaining the sort order.
label: bug

title: Add mobile app for iOS and Android
body: Develop native mobile applications for iOS and Android with core functionality including viewing, creating, and updating records with push notification support.
label: feature

title: Dropdown menu closes unexpectedly on mobile
body: On Android devices, the dropdown menu closes immediately after opening when the user tries to scroll through options.
label: bug

title: Drag and drop reorder loses data on drop
body: When reordering list items using drag and drop, the dropped item loses its associated data and only the title remains after repositioning.
label: bug

title: Document rate limits and quotas clearly
body: The rate limiting documentation is vague and does not specify exact limits per endpoint. Developers need precise numbers to build reliable integrations.
label: documentation

title: Update SDK documentation for Python 3.11
body: The Python SDK documentation has not been updated to reflect compatibility with Python 3.11 and newer async patterns. Code examples still use deprecated syntax.
label: documentation

title: Document testing strategy and how to run tests
body: New contributors do not know how to run the test suite or what testing frameworks and conventions are used in the project. This should be documented in the developer guide.
label: documentation

title: App crashes when uploading files larger than 10MB
body: When I try to upload a file larger than 10MB the app crashes with a null pointer exception. Steps to reproduce: 1. Open the app 2. Click upload 3. Select a file > 10MB. Expected: File uploads successfully. Actual: App crashes.
label: bug

title: Add changelog with version history
body: There is no changelog documenting what changed between versions. Users upgrading need to know about breaking changes and new features in each release.
label: documentation

title: Add examples for complex query syntax
body: The advanced query documentation lacks real world examples showing how to combine multiple filters, use nested conditions, and work with date range queries.
label: documentation

title: Support conditional logic in forms
body: Add the ability to show or hide form fields based on the values of other fields to create dynamic forms that adapt to user input.
label: feature

title: Support OAuth login with GitHub
body: Add GitHub OAuth as a login option so developers can sign in with their existing GitHub account without creating a separate username and password.
label: feature

title: Table row hover state sticks on touch devices
body: On touch screen devices, the hover state on table rows remains active after the user lifts their finger causing visual inconsistency.
label: bug

title: Implement smart duplicate detection
body: Automatically detect and warn users about potential duplicate records when creating new entries based on similarity of key fields.
label: feature

title: Add two factor authentication
body: Implement two factor authentication using TOTP apps like Google Authenticator for enhanced account security. Users should be able to enable or disable this from their account settings.
label: feature

title: File permissions not set correctly after upload
body: Uploaded files are given 777 permissions instead of the expected 644, creating a security vulnerability.
label: bug

title: User session expires too quickly
body: Users are being logged out after 5 minutes of inactivity even though the session timeout is configured to 30 minutes.
label: bug

title: Add accessibility guidelines for developers
body: Documentation on building accessible features following WCAG 2.1 guidelines would help contributors ensure the product remains usable by people with disabilities.
label: documentation

title: Add customizable dashboard widgets
body: Allow users to build their own dashboards by selecting and arranging widgets showing metrics, charts, and data summaries relevant to their role.
label: feature

title: Document backup and restore procedures
body: There is no documentation on how to back up and restore data. This is critical information for production deployments and disaster recovery planning.
label: documentation

title: Form validation allows XSS in text fields
body: Text input fields do not sanitize HTML tags allowing cross site scripting attacks to be stored in the database.
label: bug

title: Add dependency tracking between tasks
body: Allow users to define dependencies between tasks so blocked tasks are automatically flagged when their prerequisite tasks are delayed or incomplete.
label: feature

title: OAuth token not refreshed before expiry
body: The OAuth access token is not being proactively refreshed before it expires, causing authenticated requests to fail until the user logs in again.
label: bug

title: Add security best practices guide
body: A dedicated security guide covering topics like API key management, data encryption, and access control configuration would help users deploy the system securely.
label: documentation

title: Add offline mode support
body: Allow the app to work offline with local data synchronization that automatically syncs changes when the internet connection is restored.
label: feature

title: Add comparison with similar tools
body: A comparison page showing how this tool differs from similar alternatives would help new users understand the unique value proposition and make an informed choice.
label: documentation

title: Push notifications not delivered on iOS 17
body: After the iOS 17 update, push notifications stopped being delivered to users on iPhones. The registration token appears to be generated correctly.
label: bug

title: Support markdown in descriptions
body: Allow users to write descriptions using Markdown syntax with a live preview panel so they can format text with headers, lists, and code blocks.
label: feature

title: Add runbook for common operational tasks
body: A runbook documenting step by step procedures for common operational tasks like scaling, failover, and routine maintenance would help operations teams.
label: documentation

title: API rate limiting not working correctly
body: The rate limiting middleware allows more requests than configured. Set to 100 requests per minute but allows up to 150 before blocking.
label: bug

title: Two factor authentication code always invalid
body: Users with two factor authentication enabled are unable to log in because the TOTP codes are always rejected even when generated correctly.
label: bug

title: Sidebar navigation collapses on route change
body: The sidebar navigation unexpectedly collapses every time the route changes, requiring users to reopen it manually.
label: bug

title: Add public sharing with permissions
body: Allow users to share specific records or views publicly with a link while controlling whether viewers can see all fields or only selected ones.
label: feature

title: Autocomplete suggestions appear behind modal
body: Autocomplete dropdown suggestions appear behind modal dialogs due to incorrect z-index values in the CSS.
label: bug

title: Add performance tuning guide
body: Documentation on how to optimize performance for large datasets and high traffic scenarios would be extremely valuable for enterprise users.
label: documentation

title: Fix broken links in the integration guides
body: Several links in the third party integration guides are broken and lead to 404 pages. The Stripe and Salesforce integration pages are particularly affected.
label: documentation

title: Search results page returns 404 after pagination
body: Clicking on page 2 or beyond in search results returns a 404 error. The URL generated for pagination is malformed.
label: bug

title: Add glossary of technical terms
body: The documentation uses technical terms without defining them. A glossary page would help new users understand concepts like idempotency, pagination tokens, and resource identifiers.
label: documentation

title: Support file previews without download
body: Add in-app preview support for common file types including PDF, images, spreadsheets, and documents so users do not need to download files to view them.
label: feature

title: Scheduled jobs run twice on server restart
body: When the server restarts while a scheduled job is running, the job executes twice causing duplicate records to be created in the database.
label: bug

title: Support custom themes and branding
body: Allow organization admins to customize the color scheme, logo, and typography to match their company branding guidelines.
label: feature

title: Email templates render differently in Outlook
body: HTML email templates look correct in Gmail and Apple Mail but render with broken layout in Microsoft Outlook 2019 and older versions.
label: bug

title: Notifications badge count not updating in real time
body: The notification bell badge count does not update in real time. Users need to refresh the page to see the updated count.
label: bug

title: Implement audit logging for compliance
body: Add comprehensive audit logs tracking all user actions with timestamps, IP addresses, and changed values for compliance and security monitoring.
label: feature

title: Search index not updated after item deletion
body: When an item is deleted, it still appears in search results because the search index is not updated synchronously after deletion.
label: bug

title: Document the data model and schema
body: A clear explanation of the underlying data model including entity relationships, field types, and constraints would help users understand how to structure their data effectively.
label: documentation

title: Image thumbnails not loading on slow connections
body: On slow 3G connections, image thumbnails fail to load and show broken image icons instead of a fallback placeholder.
label: bug

title: Implement real time collaboration
body: Allow multiple users to work on the same document simultaneously with live cursor tracking and conflict resolution similar to Google Docs.
label: feature

title: Support multi currency for financial data
body: Add support for storing and displaying monetary values in multiple currencies with automatic conversion using live exchange rates.
label: feature

title: Add recurring task scheduling
body: Allow users to create tasks that automatically repeat on daily, weekly, monthly, or custom schedules with options to set end dates or occurrence limits.
label: feature

title: Document the webhook payload format
body: The webhook integration documentation does not describe the format of the payload sent to the endpoint. Users need to know the exact JSON structure to build receivers.
label: documentation

title: Loading spinner never disappears on error
body: When an API call fails, the loading spinner continues to show indefinitely instead of showing an error message.
label: bug

title: Mobile keyboard pushes layout above viewport
body: On iOS devices, when the virtual keyboard appears, the page layout gets pushed above the viewport making the input field invisible.
label: bug

title: Improve error message documentation
body: Error messages in the app are cryptic and not explained in the documentation. Users who encounter ERRCODE 4012 or ERRCODE 5023 have no way to understand what went wrong.
label: documentation

title: Add interactive API explorer to docs
body: An interactive API explorer similar to Swagger UI would allow developers to test API calls directly from the documentation without needing a separate tool.
label: documentation

title: Date picker shows wrong timezone
body: The date picker component displays dates in UTC instead of the user's local timezone, causing confusion for users in non-UTC regions.
label: bug

title: WebSocket connection drops after 30 seconds
body: WebSocket connections are disconnecting every 30 seconds even when the client is active. The keepalive ping is not being sent correctly.
label: bug

title: Add video tutorials for onboarding
body: New users would benefit greatly from short video tutorials covering the core workflows. Text documentation alone is not enough for users who prefer visual learning.
label: documentation

title: Null pointer exception in payment processing module
body: A NullPointerException is thrown when processing payments with expired cards. The exception is not caught properly and causes a 500 error response.
label: bug

title: PDF generation corrupts special characters
body: PDFs generated from content containing special characters like accents and symbols display garbled text instead of the correct characters.
label: bug

title: Cache not invalidated after profile update
body: After a user updates their profile information, the old cached data is still displayed to other users for up to 1 hour.
label: bug

title: Document the caching behavior of the API
body: The API caching behavior is undocumented. Users do not know when to expect cached versus fresh responses and how to force cache invalidation when needed.
label: documentation

title: Export to CSV fails for datasets over 5000 rows
body: Attempting to export datasets with more than 5000 rows results in a timeout error. The export process does not handle large datasets efficiently.
label: bug

title: Implement email to task conversion
body: Allow users to forward emails to a special address that automatically creates tasks from the email content with the sender as the requester.
label: feature

title: Fix inconsistent terminology throughout docs
body: The documentation uses different terms for the same concepts across pages. For example workspace and organization are used interchangeably causing confusion.
label: documentation

title: Add architecture overview diagram
body: New contributors to the project would benefit from a high level architecture diagram showing how the main components interact and the flow of data through the system.
label: documentation

title: Add API rate limit dashboard
body: Provide a dashboard showing API usage statistics, rate limit consumption, and historical request volumes for developers using the API.
label: feature

title: Add activity timeline for each record
body: Show a chronological timeline of all changes and actions performed on each record so users can see the full history of modifications.
label: feature

title: Add API authentication examples to docs
body: The API documentation is missing examples showing how to authenticate requests using Bearer tokens. Please add code examples in Python, JavaScript, and curl.
label: documentation

title: Add email digest notifications
body: Provide users the option to receive a daily or weekly email digest of activity instead of individual real time notifications.
label: feature

title: Update getting started guide for version 3
body: The getting started guide still references version 2 installation steps. It needs to be updated to reflect the new version 3 setup process and configuration options.
label: documentation

title: Support webhooks for third party integrations
body: Add webhook support so users can configure external URLs to receive event notifications when records are created, updated, or deleted.
label: feature

title: Add deprecation notices for old API endpoints
body: Several API endpoints are deprecated but the documentation does not indicate this. Users need clear deprecation warnings with migration paths to the new endpoints.
label: documentation

title: Support custom fields and data types
body: Allow organization admins to add custom fields to any record type with support for text, number, date, dropdown, checkbox, and URL data types.
label: feature

title: Document environment variables and configuration
body: The list of available environment variables is scattered across multiple pages. A single comprehensive configuration reference would be very helpful.
label: documentation

title: Support bulk import from CSV
body: Allow users to import multiple records at once by uploading a CSV file. The import should validate each row and show a summary of successful and failed imports.
label: feature

title: Add project templates library
body: Create a library of pre built project templates that users can use as starting points to quickly set up common workflows without configuring from scratch.
label: feature

title: Add data export to multiple formats
body: Allow users to export their data in CSV, JSON, Excel, and PDF formats from the dashboard with options to select specific date ranges and fields.
label: feature

title: Document the plugin system for contributors
body: Contributors wanting to build plugins have no documentation on the plugin API, available hooks, and how to package and distribute plugins.
label: documentation

title: Support multiple languages and localization
body: Add internationalization support for at least Spanish, French, German, Japanese, and Portuguese with automatic language detection based on browser settings.
label: feature

title: Support table relationships and linked records
body: Allow users to create relationships between different data tables and link records across tables to build relational data structures without writing SQL.
label: feature

title: Avatar upload crops image incorrectly
body: The avatar image cropper cuts off the top portion of the uploaded image regardless of how the user positions the crop area.
label: bug

title: Add tutorial for building a custom integration
body: A step by step tutorial walking through the process of building a custom integration from scratch would greatly help developers getting started with the API.
label: documentation

title: Implement smart search suggestions
body: Add predictive search suggestions that appear as the user types based on their search history, recent items, and popular searches across the platform.
label: feature

title: Implement data versioning and rollback
body: Add version history for all records allowing users to see previous versions and roll back to any earlier state with a confirmation step.
label: feature

title: Document data retention and privacy policies
body: Technical documentation on how user data is stored, retained, and deleted would help enterprise customers assess compliance with GDPR and other privacy regulations.
label: documentation

title: Build fails on Windows due to path separator
body: The build script uses forward slashes in file paths which causes failures on Windows where backslashes are expected by the file system.
label: bug

title: Report generation crashes for date ranges over 1 year
body: Generating reports with a date range exceeding 12 months causes the server to run out of memory and crash the process.
label: bug

title: Translate documentation to Spanish
body: A significant portion of users are Spanish speaking and have requested translated documentation. Starting with the getting started guide and API reference would have the most impact.
label: documentation

title: Login fails with correct credentials on Safari
body: Users on Safari browser cannot log in even with correct username and password. The form submits but redirects back to login page with no error message shown.
label: bug

title: Add Slack integration for alerts
body: Integrate with Slack so users can receive important alerts and notifications directly in their Slack channels with configurable trigger conditions.
label: feature

title: Chart tooltip shows NaN for zero values
body: Bar chart tooltips display NaN instead of 0 when the data point value is exactly zero.
label: bug

title: Memory leak in background sync service
body: The background sync service gradually consumes more memory over time. After running for 6 hours, memory usage goes from 200MB to over 2GB causing the process to get killed.
label: bug

title: Infinite scroll triggers multiple API calls
body: The infinite scroll implementation fires multiple simultaneous API requests when the user scrolls quickly, causing duplicate data to appear.
label: bug

title: Update screenshots in user guide
body: The screenshots in the user guide are outdated and show the old interface from version 1. They need to be replaced with current screenshots matching the new design.
label: documentation

title: Fix typos and grammar in user manual
body: The user manual contains numerous typos and grammatical errors that make it difficult to read. A thorough proofreading pass is needed especially in chapters 3 through 7.
label: documentation

title: Improve search functionality in documentation
body: The documentation search does not return relevant results for common queries. Searching for password reset returns unrelated pages about general settings.
label: documentation

title: Add contributing guide for open source
body: The repository is missing a CONTRIBUTING.md file explaining how to set up the development environment, coding standards, and the pull request review process.
label: documentation

title: Implement smart scheduling assistant
body: Add an intelligent scheduling feature that analyzes team availability and workload to suggest optimal times for meetings and task assignments.
label: feature

title: Add code examples for all REST endpoints
body: Many REST API endpoints in the reference documentation only have parameter descriptions but no code examples. Please add at least one example request and response for each endpoint.
label: documentation

title: Add troubleshooting section for common errors
body: A troubleshooting section explaining common error codes and how to resolve them would save users a lot of time. Most questions in the forum are about errors that could be addressed in docs.
label: documentation

title: Improve CLI documentation with more examples
body: The command line interface documentation lists available commands but lacks practical examples showing real use cases and how to combine commands in shell scripts.
label: documentation

title: Batch delete operation only deletes first item
body: When selecting multiple items and clicking delete, only the first selected item gets deleted. The rest remain in the list.
label: bug

title: Add time tracking feature
body: Allow users to log time spent on tasks directly in the app with reports showing time breakdown by project, user, and time period.
label: feature

title: Add Gantt chart view for projects
body: Provide a Gantt chart visualization for project tasks showing dependencies, timelines, and resource assignments in an interactive draggable interface.
label: feature

title: Add onboarding checklist for new users
body: A step by step onboarding checklist in the documentation would help new users set up their account and complete the most important configuration steps in the right order.
label: documentation

title: Graph rendering fails with empty datasets
body: When a graph component receives an empty array as data, it throws a rendering error instead of displaying a no data message.
label: bug

title: Add migration guide from v1 to v2
body: Users migrating from version 1 to version 2 have no official guide. The breaking changes need to be documented with before and after code examples.
label: documentation

title: Implement smart notifications with priority
body: Add an intelligent notification system that categorizes notifications by priority and allows users to set quiet hours and focus modes.
label: feature

title: Add FAQ page for common questions
body: A frequently asked questions page would reduce repetitive questions in the support forum. The most common questions are about billing, data limits, and account management.
label: documentation
